verbatim_prompt: The RequestBar of an HTTP client visually drifts from the design reference on several presentational props an earlier fidelity pass did not enumerate: (1) the method-select trigger's font-family, text colour and surrounding treatment; (2) the method dropdown's OPEN PANEL (menu) styling; (3) the URL input — a missing leading link icon, a wrong font, and a placeholder that must match the reference string exactly ("Enter URL or paste cURL command…", a literal placeholder only — NO cURL behaviour implied); (4) the Save button's hover state; (5) the Share button carries a visible text label but the reference shows it icon-only. Fix these as exact computed-style targets, zero behaviour change. Visual fidelity is MANDATORY: design/reference.html is the VISUAL TARGET to match to pixel parity, and the exact resolved values are pre-extracted in design/styles.css and design/design-fidelity-contract.md — use those exact computed-style values, treating var(--token) as resolves-to-token (not a literal hex) and color-mix(...) at token level. Copy the VALUES, never the CODE: the export carries generated cruft (data-om-* attributes, __OmT wrappers, inline styles, a tweaks-panel) that must NOT enter the build — rebuild with semantic class names bound to design/tokens.json. Apply ONLY this disposition (the contract is the full reference menu; the app diverges from parts of it): MATCH the "Request bar" and "Method colours (per verb)" sections for the elements above; Share values MATCH .btn-ghost BUT assert it icon-only (no text label) and keep Share disabled (no behaviour assertion); DEVIATE/OUT on the "Send split-dropdown" section — the app ships a simple Send with no split (that surface is the send-options feature, not this bug). Scope: RequestBar.css + presentational RequestBar.tsx (URL link icon, exact placeholder, drop Share label) + the Dropdown molecule's menu panel; tab-title behaviour, Send-options, and Share enable/behaviour are out; tests stay green.

symptom.value: RequestBar drifts from design/reference.html on 5 presentational props an earlier fidelity pass (spec 010) did not enumerate: method-trigger font/colour/treatment, method dropdown OPEN PANEL styling, URL input (missing leading link icon + wrong font + wrong placeholder string), Save hover state, Share rendered with text label instead of icon-only.

affected_area.value: src/renderer/src/components/organisms/RequestBar.tsx + RequestBar.css (method trigger, URL input, Save/Share buttons) AND src/renderer/src/components/molecules/Dropdown.tsx + Dropdown.css (method menu OPEN PANEL)

repro_or_current.value: Currently: method trigger uses wrong font-family/text-colour + surrounding treatment vs reference; method dropdown OPEN PANEL mis-styled vs reference; URL input has no leading link icon, wrong font, and placeholder string not matching reference; Save button hover state off; Share renders a visible text label instead of icon-only. All purely visual drift from design/reference.html.

desired.value: Every listed element matches design/reference.html to pixel parity using the exact resolved values pre-extracted in design/styles.css + design-fidelity-contract.md (var(--token)=resolves-to-token; color-mix(...) at token level), bound to semantic class names from design/tokens.json (no export cruft: data-om-*, __OmT, inline styles, tweaks-panel). Dispositions: MATCH 'Request bar' + 'Method colours (per verb)' for the listed elements; Share MATCHES .btn-ghost but icon-only + stays disabled; 'Send split-dropdown' section DEVIATE/OUT. URL placeholder equals exactly 'Enter URL or paste cURL command…' (literal, no cURL behaviour).

unchanged_behavior.value: Zero behaviour change: method-select still opens/selects + colour-codes; URL input still edits (placeholder is text-only — NO new cURL parsing); Save/Share enable/disable logic unchanged (Share stays disabled, no behaviour assertion); tab-title behaviour untouched; Send stays a simple Send (no split-dropdown / Send-options); all existing tests stay green.

gaps.description: Confirm via a live computed-style + screenshot diff that the method-trigger and Save-hover already meet the design/styles.css targets (spec 010 may have fixed them) before locking those rules — residual drift, if any, is context-only not a static value gap.
Decide whether the bounded shared menu-panel molecule edit is acceptable system-wide (prod consumers beyond the request bar) or should be deferred — the runner-up framing tension.

intake_classifications.statement: RequestBar drifts from design reference on 5 un-enumerated presentational props: (1) method-select trigger font-family/text-colour/surrounding treatment; (2) method dropdown OPEN PANEL styling; (3) URL input missing leading link icon + wrong font + placeholder must equal 'Enter URL or paste cURL command…' (literal, no cURL behaviour); (4) Save button hover state; (5) Share shows text label but reference is icon-only. Match exact computed-style targets from design/styles.css + design-fidelity-contract.md, zero behaviour change. Share MATCH .btn-ghost but icon-only + stay disabled. Send split-dropdown OUT.
intake_classifications.minimal_fix: Bind RequestBar.css + presentational RequestBar.tsx + Dropdown menu-panel to the exact computed-style values for the 5 elements (var(--token) resolves-to-token, color-mix at token level) using semantic class names from design/tokens.json; add URL leading link icon; set exact placeholder; drop Share text label (icon-only, keep disabled). No behaviour change, tests stay green.
